blended.narrative: Cannon Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
